full_text: Ferguson to Stokes, Lbw!! New Zealand are finishing well. Stokes is plumb LBW, . This looked so adjacent though, another pacy yorker, right at the blockhole, flicked Stokes's back leg on its way to the keeper. The impact is right in front of off and it's smashing into the off-stump. Only umpire's call, but that'll do for New Zealand. Ferguson kept it very full, Stokes was so deep that the ball snuck under and crashed into his pads, the angle was there, but it did shave the off-stump, according to Hawk-Eye.

short_text: Woakes to Conway, Caught by Buttler!! Edged and caught! Conway never looked at ease tonight, tries to hit his way out of
full_text: Woakes to Conway, Caught by Buttler!! Edged and caught! Conway never looked at ease tonight, tries to hit his way out of trouble and has only inside edged the pull to the keeper - Buttler flies across to his right and comes up with a two-handed special. Short and at the stumps, Conway shuffled right across on the flap-pull, gets an under-edge to the right of the keeper. Buttler dived full length and caught it only at the edge of his gloves, but he does manage to hold on even as he landed on the turf. The third umpire has a couple of looks and confirms that it indeed was a fair catch. So New Zealand lose an early wicket once again.

short_text: Moeen Ali to Conway, no run, has Moeen got Conway? He looks confident, so does Buttler - has Conway dragged his feet out
full_text: Moeen Ali to Conway, no run, has Moeen got Conway? He looks confident, so does Buttler - has Conway dragged his feet out? If he did so, did he get it back in time? Quick work behind the stumps, no bat and we move onto the stumping. Is the foot in the air? Or has he got it down in time? This is extremely tight and umpire Rod Tucker asks for some more angles. The close-up angle shows that the foot is grounded and Conway survives. Lovely off-break and Conway was dragged into the drive, drifted in and then spun away, Conway lunged forward, gets beaten and is good enough to drag his feet back in time
